SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.equipment.capacity

Class BottleneckTracker.Snapshot

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.equipment.capacity.BottleneckTracker.Snapshot
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
BottleneckTracker
public static class BottleneckTracker.Snapshot extends Object implements Serializable
Immutable snapshot of the binding bottleneck at one point in time.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private final String
    constraintName
    Name of the binding constraint, or "None" if unconstrained.
    private final String
    equipmentName
    Name of the bottleneck equipment, or "None" if unconstrained.
    private final boolean
    exceeded
    Whether the binding constraint is exceeded (utilization above 100%).
    private final boolean
    hasBottleneck
    Whether a bottleneck (equipment and constraint) was present.
    private final String
    label
    Optional human-readable label for the step (may be empty, never null).
    private static final long
    serialVersionUID
    Serialization version identifier.
    private final double
    time
    The time stamp (year, second, iteration, ... — caller defined).
    private final double
    utilizationPercent
    Utilization of the binding constraint in percent (100.0 = 100%).

  • Field Details

    • serialVersionUID

      private static final long serialVersionUID
      Serialization version identifier.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • time

      private final double time
      The time stamp (year, second, iteration, ... — caller defined).

    • label

      private final String label
      Optional human-readable label for the step (may be empty, never null).

    • equipmentName

      private final String equipmentName
      Name of the bottleneck equipment, or "None" if unconstrained.

    • constraintName

      private final String constraintName
      Name of the binding constraint, or "None" if unconstrained.

    • utilizationPercent

      private final double utilizationPercent
      Utilization of the binding constraint in percent (100.0 = 100%).

    • exceeded

      private final boolean exceeded
      Whether the binding constraint is exceeded (utilization above 100%).

    • hasBottleneck

      private final boolean hasBottleneck
      Whether a bottleneck (equipment and constraint) was present.

  • Constructor Details

    • Snapshot

      public Snapshot(double time, String label, String equipmentName, String constraintName, double utilizationPercent, boolean exceeded, boolean hasBottleneck)
      Creates an immutable bottleneck snapshot.
      Parameters:
      time - the time stamp (caller-defined units)
      label - optional human-readable label; null is stored as an empty string
      equipmentName - the bottleneck equipment name
      constraintName - the binding constraint name
      utilizationPercent - the utilization in percent (100.0 = 100%)
      exceeded - true if the constraint is exceeded
      hasBottleneck - true if a bottleneck equipment/constraint was present

  • Method Details

    • getTime

      public double getTime()
      Gets the time stamp of this snapshot.
      Returns:
      the time stamp in caller-defined units

    • getLabel

      public String getLabel()
      Gets the human-readable label for this snapshot.
      Returns:
      the label, or an empty string if none was supplied

    • getEquipmentName

      public String getEquipmentName()
      Gets the name of the bottleneck equipment.
      Returns:
      the equipment name, or "None" if unconstrained

    • getConstraintName

      public String getConstraintName()
      Gets the name of the binding constraint.
      Returns:
      the constraint name, or "None" if unconstrained

    • getUtilizationPercent

      public double getUtilizationPercent()
      Gets the utilization of the binding constraint.
      Returns:
      the utilization in percent (100.0 = 100%)

    • isExceeded

      public boolean isExceeded()
      Checks whether the binding constraint is exceeded.
      Returns:
      true if the utilization is above 100%

    • hasBottleneck

      public boolean hasBottleneck()
      Checks whether a bottleneck equipment/constraint was present.
      Returns:
      true if a bottleneck was found at this step

    • getIdentity

      public String getIdentity()
      Gets the "equipment::constraint" identity key used for migration detection.
      Returns:
      the identity key combining equipment and constraint names

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
